name: EvolveClaw
description: Self-improving agent prompt evolution — synthesizes, manages, and refines guidelines from execution traces via SCOPE.

serverUrl.label: SCOPE Server URL
serverUrl.help: URL of the SCOPE sidecar server (default: http://127.0.0.1:5757).

agentName.label: Agent Name
agentName.help: Unique identifier for this agent in SCOPE's memory (default: openclaw-agent).

enabled.label: Enable Prompt Evolution
enabled.help: Toggle SCOPE prompt evolution on/off without uninstalling.

injectMode.label: Injection Mode
injectMode.help: Where to inject SCOPE guidelines: append_system (cacheable) or prepend_context (per-turn).

maxGuidelines.label: Max Guidelines
maxGuidelines.help: Maximum number of guidelines to keep in memory. Oldest tactical guidelines are evicted first when the cap is reached.

scopeModel.label: SCOPE Model Override
scopeModel.help: Override the LLM model used by SCOPE for guideline synthesis (e.g. gpt-4o-mini). Defaults to OpenClaw's primary model.

scopeProvider.label: SCOPE Provider Override
scopeProvider.help: Override the LLM provider for SCOPE (anthropic, openai, litellm). Auto-detected from OpenClaw's model config by default.

scopeApiKey.label: SCOPE API Key Override
scopeApiKey.help: Override the API key used by SCOPE. Defaults to OpenClaw's configured key for the primary model provider.

scopeBaseUrl.label: SCOPE Base URL Override
scopeBaseUrl.help: Override the base URL for SCOPE's LLM API. Defaults to OpenClaw's configured provider base URL.
